title: How do I stop notifications after the task is marked as Done?
excerpt: I marked a task as Done and, an hour later, I got a notification saying that the task blablabla that you’re subscribed to in Board is due today. How to avoid this?

posts.author: cquad (Camilla)
posts.cookedHtml: I marked a task as Done and, an hour later, I got a notification saying that the task blablabla that you’re subscribed to in Board is due today. How to avoid this?

posts.author: Marko (Marko Petrović)
posts.cookedHtml:
You need to use this type of automation:

Untitled picture1422×107 5.32 KB

This way if you marked task as Done it wont send you notifications

posts.author: cquad (Camilla)
posts.cookedHtml: Wow, I totally missed that. Thank you, that solves it!
